observation: Ledger drift fixed: promoted creator-workflow-gate-health-route from candidates[] selected winner to retained_routes[] (shipped 32/32 gate health in prior run). Now 21 retained routes. Selected creator-orphan-script-route as next winner. Added creator-example-check-coverage-route as fresh candidate (3 active: orphan-script, regression-noise, example-check-coverage). All baseline gates pass: 23/23 regression, 0/0 parity drift, 4/4 autonomy. Remaining gap: ~5 orphan script files without package.json entries, and surfaces in examples/ that lack corresponding check scripts.
population: creator capsule proof/check surface mutations for catching drift and maintaining cross-repo consistency across autonomous Darwin runs
selection_pressure: help a creator verify all surfaces in one pass, pre-flight the execution environment, keep scripts and docs in sync, reduce noise in regression output, and catch WORKFLOW_INDEX doc drift against executable scripts

candidates.mutation: Add an orphan script check (bun creator:orphan-script-check) that discovers all scripts/creator-*.ts files in scripts/, cross-references against package.json creator:* entries, and reports scripts without package.json entries — catching orphan source files that waste agent attention and may harbor stale/abandoned work.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-orphan-script-check.ts that reads scripts/ directory, finds all creator-*.ts files, verifies each has a corresponding package.json entry (handling direct paths, through-run paths, and helper imports), and reports PASS/FAIL per orphan
candidates.risk: Must handle scripts that are intentionally not in package.json (helper scripts imported by other scripts). Boundary between 'creator check' and 'internal helper' must be clearly defined to avoid false positives.

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report — improving autonomous Darwin signal-to-noise ratio.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-regression-filter.ts that wraps the regression orchestrator, filters out known pre-existing bun-types lint errors from output, and reports only actionable failures
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean (23/23 PASS), no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise into TypeScript compilation output during bun run.

candidates.mutation: Add an example surface check coverage audit (bun creator:example-check-coverage) that discovers all examples/creator-*.html surfaces and verifies each has a corresponding creator:*check script in package.json — catching surfaces that were added to examples/ but lack machine gate verification.
candidates.phenotype: scripts/creator-example-check-coverage.ts that reads examples/ directory, finds all creator-*.html files, maps to expected check scripts via naming convention, verifies existence and execution, and reports PASS/MISSING per surface
candidates.risk: Surface naming conventions may not always map 1:1 to check script names (e.g., creator-prompt-dna-adapter.html maps to creator:prompt-dna-check). Must maintain a known mapping table similar to docs-surface-parity pattern.

retained_routes.retained_as: generated TouchDesigner/twozero topology and safety handoff
standardized browser DOM/vision QA evidence for TouchDesigner surface
unified regression orchestrator (22-check surface + autonomy + hackathon:score in one pass)
unified artifact-measurement gateway (all 11 retained surface HTML artifacts)
Per-surface health check (dynamically discovers all creator-*.html surfaces)
Script source file health check (validates every creator:* package.json script has an existing source file — 23/23 healthy)
WORKFLOW_INDEX gate health check (cross-references all 32 gates against package.json scripts, validates existence and execution — 32/32 PASS)

retention: Promoted creator-workflow-gate-health-route from candidates[] selected winner to retained_routes[] (shipped in prior run: 32/32 gates cross-referenced against package.json scripts, all exist and pass). Selected creator-orphan-script-route as next winner. Added creator-example-check-coverage-route as fresh candidate (maintaining 3 active mutations). Fixed docs-surface-parity gap where doc listed workflow-gate-health as retained but JSON ledger still had it as selected winner.
